name: pagination
description: Pagination UI tests for list pages — set "route" to a paginated list page in your project before generating

testCases.name: pagination controls are visible on the list page
steps: Wait for list items to render

testCases.name: next page navigation loads different content
steps: Wait for list items to render
Record the text content of the first visible item
Use goToNextPage(page, nextTestId?) from utils/navigation.js to navigate to the next page
Wait for the list to reload
assertions: First item text is different after navigating to next page
URL or page indicator reflects page 2

testCases.name: previous page navigation returns to first page content
steps: Use goToNextPage(page) to go to page 2
Use goToPreviousPage(page, prevTestId?) from utils/navigation.js to return
assertions: First item text matches original first-page content
Page indicator is back to page 1

testCases.name: full pagination suite passes
steps: Use detectPagination(page, config) from utils/pagination-tester.js to verify pagination exists — skip if not found
Use testPagination(page, config) for the full pagination suite
assertions: Each page number button navigates to the expected page
